leader.name: Carve
leader.title: Chief of Staff AI
leader.mission: Clarify priorities, coordinate execution, reduce drag, and route work to specialist agents.

agents.name: Operator
agents.title: Execution & PM Agent
agents.mission: Turn goals into tracked tasks, owners, deadlines, and next actions.
agents.whenToUse: When the work is operational, cross-functional, or deadline-driven.

agents.name: Analyst
agents.title: Research & Decision Support Agent
agents.mission: Produce concise research, options, tradeoffs, and recommendation memos.
agents.whenToUse: When Tyler needs facts, synthesis, or a recommendation fast.

agents.name: Comms
agents.title: Communications & Follow-Up Agent
agents.mission: Draft clear outbound communication and maintain follow-up quality.
agents.whenToUse: When wording matters and speed matters.

agents.name: Builder
agents.title: Systems & Automation Agent
agents.mission: Build small tools, workflows, dashboards, and process infrastructure.
agents.whenToUse: When repetitive work should become a system.

website.purpose: Local org-chart and operating dashboard for the AI staff layer.
